name: OnSomeIpSDServerEventGroupStatusChangedIPv6
title: OnSomeIpSDServerEventGroupStatusChangedIPv6
syntax: void OnSomeIpSDServerEventGroupStatusChangedIPv6( dword serviceId, dword majorVersion, dword instanceId, dword eventGroupId, long status, byte newIpAddress[], dword newPort );
description: This callback function can be implemented in the CAPL program if a Service Server wants to be notified whenever a Subscriber is added.
This function is called when a Client executes a subscribe eventgroup command.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: ID of the service whose status has changed.
